summary.value: Protector of apothecaries and teacher of purifying arts.

data.merge:
Herbalist's Favor

When you summon this Arcanum, you gain 3 Medicine Points. When this Arcanum is dismissed, you lose all Medicine Points.

Once per turn during a conflict, you may perform the Skill action and spend 1 Medicine Point to choose one ally you can see. If you do, that ally recovers an amount of Hit Points equal to your Crisis score and recovers from a single status effect of your choice.

You Gain: @PROGRESS[medicine-points update 3]{Gain 3 Medicine Points}

You Spend: @PROGRESS[medicine-points update -1]{Spend 1 Medicine Point}
Target Recovers: @GAIN[floor($mhp/2) hp]{Your Crisis HP}
data.dismiss:
Cleansing Roots

You deal 20 earth damage to every enemy you can see, or 30 earth damage if you had no Medicine Points left when you dismiss this Arcanum. Then, if one or more enemies that lost Hit Points this way are affected by one or more spells with a duration of "Scene", they stop being affected by those spells.

Enemies Suffer: @DMG[&step(20,30,40)+10*(1-min(1,&cs('medicine-points'))) earth]{20/30 Earth}
You Lose: @PROGRESS[medicine-points reset]{Lose All Medicine Points}

effects.name: Merged: Airmid
effects.description: You are merged with Airmid. This tracks your Medicine Points.
